title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at BITS Pilani Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at BITS Pilani Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BITS Pilani Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BITS Pilani Digital Technologies:
BITS Pilani Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani Digital Technologies!
